name: ExtensionActivityDefinition_Location
title: R5: location additional types
description: R5: `ActivityDefinition.location` additional types (CodeableReference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Location)) additional types from child elements (concept)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ActivityDefinition.location` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ActivityDefinition.location` 0..1 `CodeableReference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Location)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ActivityDefinition.location` 0..1 `CodeableReference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Location)`
*  R4B: `ActivityDefinition.location` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Location)`
*  R4: `ActivityDefinition.location` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Location)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ActivityDefinition.location` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ActivityDefinition.location` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `ActivityDefinition.location` do not cover the following types: CodeableReference.
The mappings for `ActivityDefinition.location` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: concept.

element.definition: R5: `ActivityDefinition.location` additional types (CodeableReference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Location)) additional types from child elements (concept)
element.comment:
Element `ActivityDefinition.location` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ActivityDefinition.location` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `ActivityDefinition.location` do not cover the following types: CodeableReference.
The mappings for `ActivityDefinition.location` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: concept.
May reference a specific clinical location or may just identify a type of location.

element.short: DataType slice for a FHIR R5 `CodeableReference` value
element.definition: Slice to indicate the presence of a R5 `CodeableReference` in FHIR R4

element.short: R5: Reference to a concept (by class) (new)
element.comment:
Element `CodeableReference.concept` is part of an existing definition because parent element `CodeableReference` requires a cross-version extension.
Element `CodeableReference.concept` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `CodeableReference` is not mapped.
Element `CodeableReference.concept` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
